title: Fiery Crisp Syrian Cream Cheese Dumplings
description: A crispy and flavorful Syrian dish featuring cream cheese and dum, served on a cedar plank, with anti-inflammatory properties. This dish is perfect for those looking for a bitter and show-off meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Soak the cedar planks in water for 30 minutes.
Mix the softened cream cheese with chopped dum, minced garlic, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
Place the mixture on the soaked cedar planks, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Drizzle the olive oil over the mixture.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the top.
Place the cedar planks on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes.
Increase the oven temperature to broil and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the edges are crispy.
Remove the dumplings from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
